title: SUNNYCLUE 102Pcs 17 Styles Silicone Cartoon Charms Focal Bead Charms Soft Rubber Summer Star Heart Bow Flower Butterfly Animal Fruit Pendants for Jewellery Making Rainbow Bracelet Keychain DIY Crafts
features: 17 Styles Silicone Cartoon Charms: There are 17 styles silicone cartoon charms, stars, hearts, bows, flowers, watermelons, oranges, carrots, popsicles, cats, butterflies, seahorses, octopuses, footballs, a variety of elements are available for you to decorate your DIY jewellery
102Pcs Focal Bead Charms: A total of 102pcs focal bead charms, enough for you to use them to make summer style DIY pendants and as beautiful gifts for others

Size and Content: Assorted silicone charms are 17 styles, 6pcs/style, 102pcs; the largest size is 3.05 x 1.45 x 0.3cm(1.20 x 0.57 x 0.12 inch); the middle size is 2.5 x 2.1 x 0.25cm(0.98 x 0.83 x 0.1 inch); the smallest size is: 1.7 x 2.05 x 0.25cm(0.67 x 0.81 x 0.1 inch)

Soft Material: These rainbow bracelet charms are made of soft silicon material, feel like rubber, durable and strong, not easy to break, fade and safety, light weight, long term wear will not be uncomfortable

Multiple Usage: Our silicone cartoon charms are great for DIY jewellery making projects, such as necklaces, bracelets, earrings, anklets, also ideal for key chains, bag tags, mobile phone decorative accessories and other DIY craft items
